products.name: Onyx Cardigan
products.description: Perfect for evening gatherings, special occasions, or layering over basic linen pieces for a sophisticated modest look.

details.fabric: 100% Premium Linen.Handcrafted with intricate patterns inspired by Islamic and Andalusian art.Lightweight yet luxurious texture, breathable with delicate openwork details
details.fit: Relaxed, flowing silhouette.Kimono-inspired design – can be worn open or tied as a robe.Midi to Maxi length for elegant modest coverage.Wide sleeves for extra comfort and statement style
details.care: Hand wash separately in cold water with mild detergent.Do not wring or twist to preserve the delicate lace.Air dry flat in shade.Low-temperature steam if needed (avoid direct contact with lace)

products.name: Dahlia Set
products.description: Perfect for summer getaways, brunch dates, and laid-back elegant evenings. Style it with woven accessories or statement scarves for a dreamy look.

details.fabric: Crinkle cotton: ultra-soft, breathable, and lightweight.Flowy texture with natural wrinkles for an effortless chic look.Skirt is fully lined to maintain modesty without compromising comfort
details.fit: Top: Adjustable wrap design with two delicate bow ties for a feminine finish.Skirt: A-line silhouette for graceful movement and timeless elegance.Modest yet youthful—perfect for modern effortless style
details.care: Hand wash in cold water or gentle machine cycle.Do not bleach.Air dry only to maintain texture.No ironing required (natural crinkle finish)

products.name: Aurora Chemise Dress
products.description: Perfect for formal occasions, work settings, or elegant casual wear. Pair with structured pants or flowy skirts for a sophisticated modest look.

details.fabric: 100% Premium Cotton,Structured and crisp for an elegant. formal silhouette.Breathable yet firm.designed to hold its shape perfectly.Requires proper ironing to maintain its polished look.
details.fit: Versatile Styling Options:Tie the two straps at the front for a classic open-front look.Or wrap them through the hidden slit for a fully closed, sleek fit.Midi length, full sleeves with refined cuffs for an elevated modest appeal.Tailored to create an elongated and graceful figure
details.care: Machine wash cold with similar colors.Use mild detergent.Do not bleach.Iron while damp for best results.Hang to dry to preserve its shape.

products.name: Thuraya Abaya
products.description: An open-front kimono style abaya with delicate embroidery on the sleeves. A true statement piece.

details.fabric: Made from premium treated pure linen.Soft on the skin, non-irritating, breathable,Characterized by fine black pinstripes adding depth and a heritage-inspired pattern
details.care: Hand wash separately in cold water with mild detergent.Do not wring or twist to preserve the delicate lace.Air dry flat in shade.Low-temperature steam if needed

products.name: Opal Linen Cardigan
products.description: An iconic piece for formal evenings, cultural gatherings, and refined casual looks. Pair it with silk scarves or minimal accessories for a timeless statement.

details.fabric: 100% Pure Linen: heavyweight, structured, and long-lasting.Firm yet breathable weave that holds its shape elegantly.Hand-stitched embroidery in soft baby tones for a refined, artistic touch.Despite its strength, it feels smooth and gentle on the skin
details.fit: Versatile wrap design: wear it as a belted robe for a sophisticated silhouette or leave it open like an abaya for flowing grace.Full-length coverage ensures modesty with a modern twist.Designed for women who value quiet luxury and effortless elegance
details.care: Dry clean recommended to preserve embroidery.If washing at home: hand wash in cold water, mild detergent.Do not bleach.Iron on low heat while damp for best finish.Avoid wringing to maintain linen structure

products.name: Dove shirt dress/ Cardigan
products.description: Lightweight and elegant, this pleated chiffon hijab adds texture and sophistication to your look.

details.fabric: 100% Premium Cotton Lace (Rocama).Delicate eyelet embroidery in floral patterns for a light, airy texture.Naturally breathable and soft on the skin, perfect for warm seasons.A fabric that evokes peace, charm, and feminine elegance
details.fit: Two-in-One Design:Wear it fully buttoned as a modest shirt dress.Or leave it open as a flowy cardigan for layering.Relaxed A-line silhouette with full-length sleeves and elegant cuffs.Perfect for cozy chic styling with a romantic, countryside touch
details.care: Hand wash recommended to maintain the delicate lace.Use cold water and a mild detergent.Avoid bleach.Dry flat to prevent stretching.Iron on low heat if needed

products.name: Basic linen dress
products.description: The foundation of every modest wardrobe – pairs seamlessly with your favorite cardigans, kimonos, or skirts for effortless elegance and layering perfection.

details.fabric: 100% Pure Linen, straight from nature to your skin Naturally breathable, moisture-absorbing, and gentle on the skin.The white color is fully lined to ensure perfect opacity.Designed for a luxurious yet natural feel
details.fit: Straight Fit for a clean, modest silhouette.Half sleeves for versatile layering.Ideal for completing your modest elegant look under open cardigans, sheer pieces, or alone for a minimal chic style
details.care: Hand wash or machine wash cold on a gentle cycle.Do not bleach.Iron on low heat while slightly damp.Avoid tumble drying; air dry for fabric longevity
